headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Ameren, Lowers Price Target to $117
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Byrd   maintains Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $119 to $117.
